@messages("thirdPartyConnectedOrganisations.p1")

  • @messages("thirdPartyConnectedOrganisations.li1")
  • @messages("thirdPartyConnectedOrganisations.li2")

@messages("thirdPartyConnectedOrganisations.p2")

@govukCheckboxes( CheckboxesViewModel( form = form, name = "value[]", hint = Some(Hint(content = Text(messages("thirdPartyConnectedOrganisations.hint")))), legend = LegendViewModel(messages("thirdPartyConnectedOrganisations.h2")) .withCssClass("govuk-fieldset__legend--m"), items = ThirdPartyCheckboxItems.items( thirdParties, form.value.getOrElse(Seq.empty) ) ) ) @govukButton( ButtonViewModel(messages("site.saveAndContinue")) ) } }
